description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Three small noise reductions. None are individually critical — bundle into one PR.

1. The EXECUTED/LINKED/CLAIMED/UNCOVERED legend (lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex:1007-1028, coverage_help) currently re-renders inside every subject's Coverage tab. Move to a single page-level disclosure near the triage panel; subject tabs link to the anchor instead of duplicating.

2. The "Raw spec-verification" disclosure (html.ex:1152-1183) is power-user noise on every Coverage tab. Move to a single page-level "Raw verification (all subjects)" disclosure near the bottom.

3. The misc panel's file tree (render_unmapped, html.ex:1393-1427) is overkill when N≤3 unmapped files. Render as a flat list under N=3, tree above.

No semantic change; this is purely density work.
title: Trim repetition: legend, raw verification, misc tree
